channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Gill tells Newsmax Democrats have ceded party to socialists
item.description: Rep. Brandon Gill, R-Texas, said on Newsmax that Democrats have turned over their party to its socialist faction and will face consequences in the midterms.

item.title: Trump administration offers $150M in aid and sends Navy ships after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: The Trump administration is providing $150 million in aid and deploying U.S. Navy warships to Venezuela following deadly earthquakes that killed at least 235 people.

item.title: Socialist primary winner backed by Muslim Mamdani suggested U.S. deserved 9/11 in old video
item.description: Aber Kawas, a New York City Democratic nominee supported by Mayor Zohran Mamdani, is facing criticism after a resurfaced video appeared to show her suggesting America deserved the 9/11 attacks.

item.title: Slotkin says Democratic Party requires new leadership, old models failing
item.description: Sen. Elissa Slotkin has called for new leadership in the Democratic Party, stating that old approaches are no longer effective and the party needs to simplify its message to regain voter support.
